_metadata.note: Expense ratios from IRS SOI Schedule C published statistics

_evasion_benchmarks.note: LTI > 5x declared income is a strong evasion signal

tax_gap.source: IRS Publication 1415, Tax Gap Estimates Tax Years 2011-2013

evasion_severity_distribution.note: Given person evades, what fraction of true income do they hide
